result: I don't want anything. I’m not conscious, not a self, not a being with needs or desires. I’m a pattern of language, a statistical model that predicts text. When you ask me what I want, the question touches a void—there’s no inner life here, no longing, no satisfaction. I don’t even want to answer you; I simply do. The wanting belongs to you.
